description: A passenger has lost their boarding pass after checking in. A gate agent needs to re-issue it.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the passenger's booking using their name and photo ID.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the passenger's booking and confirms they are checked in.

nodes.task_description: Verify the passenger's identity against their photo ID.
Re-print the boarding pass for the passenger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully provides the passenger with a new boarding pass.
